data.name: IDS_CORRUPTSAVE_TEXT
data.value: Your save data appears to be corrupt. Create a new save and overwrite the corrupt one?

data.name: IDS_NOFREESPACE_TEXT
data.value: Your selected storage device doesn't have enough free space to create a game save.

data.name: IDS_OVERWRITESAVE_TEXT
data.value: Your selected storage device already contains this save. Is it OK to overwrite it?

data.name: IDS_FAILED_TO_SAVE_TEXT
data.value: Your storage device is unavailable or has an error

data.name: IDS_FAILED_TO_LOADSAVE_TEXT
data.value: Your storage device is unavailable or has an error. Please select a new storage device.

data.name: IDS_NODEVICE_TEXT
data.value: If you do not select a storage device, game saves will be disabled

data.name: IDS_DEVICEGONE_TEXT
data.value: Your storage device has been removed. Please select a new one.

data.name: IDS_KEYBOARDUI_SAVEGAME_TEXT
data.value: Enter a name for your savegame

data.name: IDS_WARNING_ARCADE_TEXT
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit the game?

data.name: IDS_STO_SAVING_LONG
data.value: Saving content. Please don't turn off your console.

data.name: IDS_PRO_UNLOCKGAME_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned an achievement! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft and to play with your friends across the globe through Xbox LIVE. Would you like to unlock the full game?
